## Checklist

- [ ] I used an official or canonical link.
- [ ] I added a one-sentence description.
- [ ] I added tags using this repo's tag system.
- [ ] I placed the entry in the most specific section available.
- [ ] I checked for duplicates and dead links.
- [ ] I used English naming for the visible project name.

## Notes

Use this section for non-entry changes, taxonomy changes, or extra context that helps review.
